title: Business Plan Executive Summary
promptText: You are a seasoned business consultant who has helped 200+ startups secure funding. Write a compelling executive summary for [COMPANY_NAME], a [BUSINESS_MODEL] startup in the [INDUSTRY] industry. The company solves [PROBLEM] for [TARGET_MARKET] by offering [SOLUTION]. Include these sections: Company Overview (2-3 sentences), Problem Statement, Solution, Target Market size and characteristics, Revenue Model, Competitive Advantage, Current Traction (use [TRACTION_METRICS] as data points), Financial Projections summary for 3 years, and Funding Ask of [FUNDING_AMOUNT] with planned allocation. Keep the entire summary under 800 words and make every sentence earn its place.
description: The executive summary is the most important page of any business plan because most investors decide whether to keep reading based on this section alone. This prompt generates a concise, compelling summary that covers all the elements sophisticated investors and lenders expect to see. The structured format ensures you do not miss critical sections like competitive advantage or funding allocation, while the word limit forces clarity and prioritization. Use it to draft your pitch deck narrative, loan applications, accelerator submissions, or internal strategic planning documents.

variables.name: PROBLEM
variables.example: generic nutrition advice that ignores individual health conditions, genetics, and lifestyle

variables.name: TARGET_MARKET
variables.example: health-conscious adults aged 25-55 managing chronic conditions through diet

variables.name: SOLUTION
variables.example: an AI-powered meal planning app that creates personalized nutrition plans based on bloodwork, genetic data, and health goals

variables.name: TRACTION_METRICS
variables.example: 12,000 paid subscribers, $45K MRR, 94% month-over-month retention, partnerships with 3 major lab testing companies

tips: Lead with your strongest traction metric to hook the reader immediately
Quantify your market size with a credible TAM/SAM/SOM breakdown
Tailor the tone based on your audience: VCs want growth metrics, banks want stability
exampleOutput:
NutriPlan AI is a B2C SaaS platform that uses artificial intelligence to create hyper-personalized nutrition plans based on individual bloodwork, genetic markers, and health goals. In a $271B global wellness market where 78% of consumers report frustration with generic dietary advice, we are the first platform to combine lab data integration with real-time meal planning.

The Problem: Over 60% of Americans managing chronic conditions like diabetes, heart disease, or autoimmune disorders receive nutrition guidance that ignores their unique biomarkers...
metaTitle: Business Plan Executive Summary Prompt for Claude
metaDescription: Write a compelling startup executive summary that investors actually read. Try this Claude prompt for your business plan or pitch deck.
